title: Observation

occurrenceID.description: Unique identifier (random UUID v4). Maps to dwc:occurrenceID.

taxonID.description: Reference to Taxon entity (UUID). Maps to dwc:taxonID.

eventDate.description: ISO 8601 date/time of the observation. Maps to dwc:eventDate.

locationID.description: Reference to Location entity (UUID). Maps to dwc:locationID.

observerID.description: Reference to Observer entity (UUID). Maps to dwc:recordedBy.

count.description: Number of individuals observed. Null indicates presence-only. Maps to dwc:individualCount.

countType.description: Type of count (exact, estimate, minimum, or presence-only).

behavior.description: Observed behaviors (e.g., feeding, singing, nesting). Maps to dwc:behavior.

remarks.description: Additional notes about the observation. Maps to dwc:occurrenceRemarks.

extensions.description: Tool-specific extensions. Keys must be namespaced: namespace.fieldName.

description: Bird observation occurrence record. Maps to Darwin Core Occurrence class (dwc:Occurrence).

CountType.description: Count precision: EXACT=exact count, ESTIMATE=estimated count, X_PLUS=at least X individuals, PRESENT=presence only (no count)
